lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes. If you'd be so kind...

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: I hope that's what you wanted!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ohhh yes. Lovely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing important.

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: The weather's really hot, don't you think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not hot for camels, surely?

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: Are you joking? It's burning hot out here! Sitting by the oasis is the only way to stay cool.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought camels carried their own water in their humps.

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: It's never enough. And it's always far too hot to go anywhere in the desert.

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: Sometimes I wish I could go travelling in cooler places, like all those adventurers I see passing through here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, adventuring's thirsty work as well.

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: Oh, that's a pity.

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: In that case, I'll just stay by this nice cool oasis.

sections.title: When talked to with a completed challenge scroll

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: *makes happier camel noises*

lines.speaker: Cam the Camel
lines.text: *makes camel noises*
